name: RecoveryPoint
description: Represents a single recovery point (snapshot, restore point, or backup image) produced by a backup job and available for restore.

id.description: Unique identifier of the recovery point.

job_id.description: Identifier of the backup job that created this recovery point.

provider.description: Backup platform that owns this recovery point.

source.description: Resource that was protected at the time this recovery point was created.

created_at.description: Time at which the recovery point was created.

expires_at.description: Time at which the recovery point will be deleted under the retention policy, if any.

size_bytes.description: On-disk size of the recovery point in bytes (after dedupe and compression).

logical_size_bytes.description: Logical (pre-dedupe, pre-compression) size of the protected data set.

storage_target.description: Storage location holding this recovery point.

immutable_until.description: Object-lock or WORM expiration time, before which the recovery point cannot be deleted.

encryption.description: Encryption status of this recovery point.

verified.description: Whether the recovery point has been integrity-verified or test-restored.

tags.description: Labels used for organization, search, and policy mapping.
